presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — Portfolio Presentation & Commitment

slides.title: Venture Portfolio Presentation Format
slides.body:
Use /my-venture-portfolio/present mode.
Slides: Cover · Identity · Dream Board · Career · Canvas · Future Self · Commitment.

5–7 minutes per participant or squad representative.
slides.speakerNotes: Demo presentation mode if possible. 5 min.

slides.title: Presentation Rubric
slides.body:
Program Coach evaluates: identity, evidence, canvas, commitment, delivery.
Mentors complete Week 1 coaching summary during presentations.
discussionQuestions: What will you improve before Hour 200?

slides.title: Squad Pitch Rehearsal
slides.body: Squads rehearse 3-minute squad story: market + persona + direction.
discussionQuestions: What is your squad's unified thesis?

slides.title: Week 1 Commitment Ceremony
slides.body:
Each participant states one commitment aloud.
Mentor records in coaching summary.

Week 2 begins — industry execution, not more setup.
discussionQuestions: What commitment are you making today?

slides.title: Week 1 Close
slides.body:
✓ Portfolio presented
✓ Blueprint Week 1 draft
✓ Mentor coaching summary
✓ Week 2 priority set

Congratulations — you are venture builders.
discussionQuestions: What will you do in the next 24 hours?
